productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's White Minnie & Red Kidswear
description: Composition:100% cotton white top and red skirt with white horizontal stripes and white, frilly endWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort Fitdisney puts together the cool and bright colours of summer in this white top  with a red and white piped round collar and small U slit. Little Minnie on cloud nine on the top complements the broad white waist band on the red and white striped skirt, that ends with a broad, white frill.
